statements.statement: I can identify when something is hard and say it helps me learn with adult support.
I can describe how mistakes and challenges help me grow and learn new things.
I can explain how setbacks in familiar activities can become chances to practice and improve.
I can reframe academic and social challenges as opportunities to develop specific skills and knowledge.
I can analyze setbacks across different contexts and identify multiple growth opportunities they present.
I can systematically reframe complex challenges into actionable learning opportunities with clear development goals.
I can evaluate and reframe multifaceted setbacks into strategic opportunities for personal and academic advancement.
I can share materials and use kind words when playing with others.
I can take turns speaking and tell others what I like about their work.
I can listen to different ideas and give helpful suggestions to improve group activities.
I can develop simple collaboration plans and provide specific feedback to support others' learning.
I can create detailed collaboration strategies and communicate constructive feedback that considers others' perspectives.
I can design comprehensive collaboration approaches and deliver nuanced feedback that promotes growth across diverse contexts.
I can evaluate and adapt sophisticated collaboration strategies while providing transformative feedback that addresses complex social dynamics.
I can ask for help when I have a problem with a friend.
I can use simple words to solve problems with others and ask adults for help.
I can identify my role in conflicts and seek help from trusted adults when needed.
I can take responsibility for my actions in conflicts and identify multiple support resources available.
I can analyze my contributions to conflicts and evaluate which support resources are most appropriate.
I can demonstrate accountability in resolving complex conflicts and justify my choice of support strategies.
I can apply personal responsibility principles to resolve diverse conflicts and systematically access appropriate support networks.
